## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] Other:

## Ownership and Security

- [ ] User-owned data queries filter by `user_id` where applicable.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or raw journal content are logged.
- [ ] `.env` or local-only files are not committed.

## Review Comment Resolution

- [ ] Every actionable review comment is either fixed or answered with a clear reason.
- [ ] Follow-up commits mention the reviewed area in the commit message or PR comment.
- [ ] No review thread is marked resolved before the fix or explanation is present.
